svg.title: EVE-NG PFE Network Topology
svg.desc: Full network topology showing Cloud0, pfSense, vIOS L2 switch, Proxmox cluster (pve1/2/3), and Ubuntu VMs (MonSrv, S1, S2) with VLAN assignments

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Cloud0 NAT in EVE-NG')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about pfSense configuration in this project')
sendPrompt('How do I configure the vIOS L2 switch for this topology?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of pve1 in this cluster?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of pve2 in this cluster?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of pve3 in this cluster?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about pfSense vm:101 HA configuration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about Wazuh vm:102 configuration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Monitoring Server stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me about S1 monitoring stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me about S2 monitoring stack')
